cover: Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Einstein 1 Platform vs Custom LLM Stack'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'Einstein 1 Platform' in soft blue/green with blocks for 'Agentforce 2.0 actions', 'Data Cloud real-time unification', 'Trust Layer and Salesforce governance'. Central Salesforce cloud node connected to Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Data Cloud, and Flow. RIGHT COLUMN 'Custom AI Stack' in soft purple/grey with blocks for 'gpt-5.5 and claude-sonnet-4-7 model routing', 'custom vector database and API gateway', 'external observability and security controls'. Central Kubernetes/API gateway node connected to OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Llama 4 Scout, Postgres, and Salesforce API v64.0. Bottom decision bar showing 'Speed + Governance' under Einstein and 'Control + Portability' under Custom. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce AI Authorization: Native vs Rebuilt'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Salesforce AI Authorization: Native vs Rebuilt'. Subtitle 'Why CRM-native agents reduce security glue code'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'FLS enforced with Schema.DescribeFieldResult shield icon', 'Sharing respected with with sharing lock icon', 'Audit logged with AI_Interaction__c timeline icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: External API trusts recordId' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Apex validates access first' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: `SELECT Id, AnnualRevenue FROM Account WHERE Id = :recordId`; right column green border '// GOOD' code: `if (!Schema.sObjectType.Account.fields.AnnualRevenue.isAccessible()) throw new SecurityException('No access'); Account a = [SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Id = :recordId WITH USER_MODE];`. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Enforce FLS', 'Use USER_MODE', 'Log AI decisions'. Footer bar: 'Do not let an LLM become a permissions bypass'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Hybrid AI Recommendation Pattern'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Hybrid AI Recommendation Pattern'. Subtitle 'Let the LLM recommend; let Salesforce enforce'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Custom gateway uses gpt-5.5 routing CPU icon', 'Salesforce API v64.0 validates access shield icon', 'AI_Recommendation__c stores trace audit icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: LLM updates Opportunity directly' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: LLM creates reviewable recommendation' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: `PATCH /services/data/v64.0/sobjects/Opportunity/006xx { \"StageName\": \"Closed Won\" }`; right column green border '// GOOD' code: `insert as user new AI_Recommendation__c(Status__c='Ready for Review');`. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Structured output', 'Permission checks', 'Human approval'. Footer bar: 'Recommendations are safer than autonomous record mutation'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
